description: Agent changed src/router/params.ts but never listed it in the Run summary (only src/router/match.ts was claimed). Both files are inside Affected areas, so params.ts surfaces as an undisclosed change (in diff, not claimed) — not as outsideScope.
note: coverageUncovered:AC-001 is the no-packet structural side-effect. targetFacts isolates the undisclosed-change signal.
